text: Chen met Johnson in Oslo to sign the agreement.
Acme opened a second plant near Karachi last spring.
Mueller will represent Globex at the hearing in Geneva.
Tanaka joined Initech after leaving Springfield.
Okafor and Reyes toured the Vostok facility.
Garcia criticized the ministry's plan for Rivertown.
Lindqvist flew from Oslo to Karachi for the summit.
Globex and Initech announced a merger on Monday.
Johnson resigned from Acme, citing the move to Lakeside.
Reyes spoke in Geneva about the Springfield audit.
Chen shipped the prototype to Vostok in June.
The order was signed by Tanaka in Rivertown.
President Okafor visited Lakeside on Friday.
The Rivertown Council rejected the zoning plan.
Dr. Garcia presented the findings to the board.
The Karachi Consortium raised new funding.
Chairman Mueller adjourned the session early.
The Springfield Ministry published its annual report.
Professor Chen addressed the Oslo delegation.
The Globex Labs team demonstrated the device.
